body_txt: A common superstition in Japanese culture: stupid people are immune to colds. When invoked, may lead to a Delayed Reaction of " did you just call me an idiot? " This has an equivalent in French, where Coryza is commonly known as "Rhume de cerveau" (brain cold), which people without a brain obviously can't catch. The English phrase "too slow to catch a cold" may or may not be related. If there is any Real Life explanation, it may be that idiots are too stupid to realize they even have a cold , then ignore it until it goes away. Another possible explanation: only an idiot would do the things that Japanese conventional wisdom says cause colds; when they don't catch the cold they should have, it's because they're idiots . Sub-Trope of Disability Immunity .
